steps.action: Click Connect Wallet then select Mock Wallet
steps.observed: Wallet row shows full 42-char address (0x + 40 hex chars), not truncated with ellipsis

steps.action: Evaluate page body for address match
steps.observed: isFull: true, full 42-char address found in page text

assertions.title: Token input shows full address after selection

steps.action: Clear From Token field and type USDC
steps.observed: Dropdown appeared with USDC item showing full address

steps.expected: Input field populated with full address
steps.observed: From Token field shows USDC with full 42-char contract address in parentheses, no truncation

steps.action: Clear From Token field and type USDC
steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown shows token with full address
steps.observed: Dropdown item shows symbol, name, and full 42-char contract address (no ellipsis truncation)

steps.action: With wallet connected and tokens selected, take screenshot at 1280px width
steps.observed: Layout correct at desktop width - wallet row, token inputs, and form all display properly
At 375px: wallet address wraps to next line properly, token inputs scroll horizontally within bounds. No content breaks outside container.

steps.action: Navigate to Ethereum USDC-to-WETH compare URL
steps.observed: Page loaded, Spandex results loaded after ~8 seconds

steps.action: Click Details [+] to expand result details
steps.expected: Details section expands with address fields
steps.observed: Details expanded, showing field-value elements for From, To, Router Address, Approval Token, Approval Spender

steps.expected: All address fields show full 42-char addresses, no truncation
steps.observed: From: USDC with full 42-char token address. To: WETH with full 42-char token address. Router Address: full 42-char contract address. Approval Token: full 42-char token address. Approval Spender: full 42-char router address. Only truncated field is Router Calldata (hex-encoded tx data, not an address - expected).

evidence.note: Router Calldata is hex-encoded tx data (expected truncation), not a token address

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Full 42-char wallet address shown after connecting mock wallet. Token input shows full address after autocomplete selection. Autocomplete dropdown items show full contract addresses. Layout intact at both desktop (1280px) and mobile (375px) widths with long addresses. Result details fields (From, To, Router Address, Approval Token, Approval Spender) all show full 42-char addresses.
